trackedDelta: Added fc-barcelona (next fixture: Birmingham City friendly 31 Jul) and kristoffer-reitan (was missing from tracked despite being in interests.alwaysTrack.athletes). Refreshed hovland/ventura/carlsen/tari/rain/ruud statuses. Enriched la-liga-2026-27 with MD1 (Athletic Club, ~16 Aug, kickoff TBA). Tagged Reitan on The Open event's norwegianPlayers.

failures: Minor: Barcelona friendly ships with streaming [] (no Norwegian channel confirmed) — acceptable and honestly noted, but leaves a 'where to watch' gap to resolve as 31 July approaches.

notes: Quiet early-morning run; board already comprehensively covered for the current window. Fanned out 3 parallel scouts (football / golf / chess+CS2) plus an independent write-time fact-checker and an independent grader.

Filled the one real per-entity gap: FC Barcelona had nothing on the board. Added Birmingham City–Barcelona pre-season friendly (Fri 31 Jul 2026, 18:45 UTC / 20:45 CEST, St Andrew's). Confidence high — verified against fcbarcelona.com official match page + club news + BCFC + ESPN, then independently fact-checked (confirmed date/time/venue). Streaming left [] (no Norwegian broadcaster confirmed for the friendly; often Barça One).

La Liga 2026/27 opener (Barcelona v Athletic Club, ~16 Aug, Camp Nou) is a confirmed fixture but kickoff is unpublished — deliberately NOT added to the board to avoid a guessed time; recorded in tracked (la-liga + fc-barcelona) for follow-up.

Reconciliation fixes: Kristoffer Reitan was missing from tracked.json entirely (he is in interests.alwaysTrack.athletes) — added; also added him to norwegianPlayers on the existing The Open event so his row resolves (was Hovland-only).

Aryan Tari lead (Andorra Open 18-26 Jul, defending champion) REJECTED: the chess-results startlist (tnr1338669) does not contain Tari (only a U16 Norwegian junior). The search summary that 'confirmed' him was an artifact. No event added — a missing event beats a wrong one.
No new events for Ventura (Corales/3M fields unpublished), Carlsen (no July tournament; not in Grand Chess Tour 2026), or 100 Thieves (no match before 21 Jul; BLAST Bounty bracket still TBD).

coverage-audit high-severity Gstaad gap already resolved pre-run (enriched static event on board via build-events mergeEnrichment fix). coverage-gaps (Uno-X, Bieber pauseshow, chess file-empty) all triaged and dismissed as non-imminent / off-season / already covered.
